2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="ssb-link negative" href="/diverse/lisens" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span class="link-text">© Statistisk sentralbyrå</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="ssb-link negative" href="/diverse/lisens" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span class="link-text">© Statistisk sentralbyrå</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="d-none mb-5">Statistikk innhold</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="">4. kvartal 2024 - 4. kvartal 2025</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="">3. kvartal 2025 - 4. kvartal 2025</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (143 characters)

<a href="https://www.ssb.no/statbank/list/detinv" id="statbankLink"><div class="content"><div class="icon-wrapper"><img alt="" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_ikon_statbank.svg"/></di
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (108 characters)

<a href="https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2019-06-21-32?q=statistikkloven">lov av 21. juni 2019 nr. 32 om offisiell statistikk og Statistisk sentralbyrå (statistikkloven, lovdata.no)</a>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="d-none mb-5">Toppbanner</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Go to home)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/en" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Go to home)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_en_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (103 characters)

<a aria-label="Investments in oil and gas, manufacturing, mining and electricity supply - Figures for 1st quarter 2026" class="ssb-link header stand-alone" href="/en/kis"><h3 class="link-text">Investm
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="ssb-link negative" href="/en/diverse/lisens" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span class="link-text">© Statistics Norway</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="d-none mb-5">Statistikk innhold</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="">Uke 5 2026 - Uke 6 2026</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="">Uke 6 2025 - Uke 6 2026</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (138 characters)

<a href="https://www.ssb.no/statbank/list/laks" id="statbankLink"><div class="content"><div class="icon-wrapper"><img alt="" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_ikon_statbank.svg"/></div>
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive

<h2 class="mt-4 mb-5"></h2>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Våre tilgjengelighetserklæringer</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="ssb-link negative" href="/diverse/lisens" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span class="link-text">© Statistisk sentralbyrå</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)'

<a class="plainLink" href="/" id="header-logo"><img alt="SSB logo (Gå til forsiden)" class="logo" loading="lazy" src="/_/service/mimir/asset/0000019c09755390/SSB_logo_anniversary_no_dark.svg"/></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="card-action" href="https://einnsyn.no/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="arrow-icon" fill="none" height="16" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" strok
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://ssb.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://ssb.no --max-pages 21 --format html
